title: Revenue Journey: Consultant Audit Tool
description: High-resolution digital presence auditor. Performs 11-platform scrape, deep-link forensics, and direct Supabase upsert.

businessUrl.title: Business Hub URL
businessUrl.description: The primary website of the business (e.g., https://apify.com).

brandName.title: Brand Name
brandName.description: Used for SEO ranking and cross-platform consistency checks.

targetKeywords.title: SEO Target Keywords
targetKeywords.description: Keywords to check organic SERP ranking for (comma-separated).

consultantEmail.title: Consultant Email
consultantEmail.description: Your email for tracking the audit source in the dashboard.

workflowStatus.title: Audit Workflow Status
workflowStatus.description: Initial status of the record in your Supabase dashboard.

urls.title: Social Profile Overrides (Optional)
urls.description: If left blank, the crawler will attempt to discover these from the Business Hub.

authTokens.title: Session Vault Overrides
authTokens.description: Active session cookies for authenticated platforms. Leave blank to use the Vault.
